name: Doomstar Ulka
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>星</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>のウルカ
desc: When exactly 1 monster you control (and no other monsters) leaves the field by an opponent's card effect (except during the Damage Step): You can banish this card from your hand or GY; if that monster is in the GY or banished face-up, Special Summon it, otherwise, Special Summon this banished card. If this card is Special Summoned: You can make this card gain 1500 ATK until the end of the next turn. You can only use each effect of "Doomstar Ulka" once per turn.
mnst_eff: When exactly 1 monster you control (and no other monsters) leaves the field by an opponent's card effect (except during the Damage Step): You can banish this card from your hand or GY; if that monster is in the GY or banished face-up, Special Summon it, otherwise, Special Summon this banished card. If this card is Special Summoned: You can make this card gain 1500 ATK until the end of the next turn. You can only use each effect of "Doomstar Ulka" once per turn.
eff: When exactly 1 monster you control (and no other monsters) leaves the field by an opponent's card effect (except during the Damage Step): You can banish this card from your hand or GY; if that monster is in the GY or banished face-up, Special Summon it, otherwise, Special Summon this banished card. If this card is Special Summoned: You can make this card gain 1500 ATK until the end of the next turn. You can only use each effect of "Doomstar Ulka" once per turn.

action: Activates if it leaves the field
summoning: Special Summons the player's banished monsters
banished: Banishes itself from hand for cost
Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
